entry.title: Copenhagen harbor, evening
entry.summary: Three from the inner harbor on a late-June evening: new housing on the Christianshavn waterfront, the Opera House across the water, and the fountain in front of it where two children were deciding how close to get. The light this far north holds long past dinner.

entry.title: Copenhagen, behind the street
entry.summary: Three spaces a few minutes apart: a courtyard reached through a dark gateway, the spiral ramp of the Round Tower, the glass dome at the Glyptotek. The city does a lot with the light it lets in slowly.
